story_title: NIP-98 HTTP Authentication for Blossom Uploads

questions.question: Does the generated event strictly conform to NIP-98 kind 27235 structure?
questions.actionable_check: Verify event has kind=27235, empty content, tags=['u', 'method', 'payload'], and valid signature
evidence_required: test output showing event structure validation
questions.pass_criteria: All structural requirements pass, signature validates

questions.question: Is the Authorization header format exactly 'Nostr <base64json>'?
questions.actionable_check: Parse header, verify 'Nostr ' prefix, decode base64, parse JSON, match event object
questions.pass_criteria: Header has correct prefix, base64 decodes to valid event JSON

questions.question: Are tokens generated per-request with unique timestamps?
questions.actionable_check: Call generateNip98Token twice with identical inputs, verify different event.id and created_at
evidence_required: test output showing two calls produce different event IDs
questions.pass_criteria: Sequential calls produce unique events due to timestamp differences

questions.question: Is created_at within 60 seconds of current time?
questions.actionable_check: Generate token, compare event.created_at to Date.now()/1000, verify difference ≤ 60s
questions.pass_criteria: created_at timestamp within 1 second of token generation time

questions.question: Do tests verify signature validity using verifyEvent?
questions.actionable_check: Check test file for verifyEvent import and usage on generated events
questions.pass_criteria: At least one test uses verifyEvent to validate signature

questions.question: Do tests cover varying input parameters?
questions.actionable_check: Check for tests with different URLs, methods (PUT/GET/POST), and body hashes
questions.pass_criteria: Tests exercise multiple combinations of url, method, bodyHash parameters

questions.question: Is Nip98AuthService a standalone module with no external dependencies?
questions.actionable_check: Verify imports only from nostr-tools/pure, no references to crypto.ts or other services
questions.pass_criteria: Only imports from nostr-tools/pure and Node.js built-ins

mandatory_questions.question: Is there any dead code introduced by this story?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Search for unused functions, classes, imports in Nip98AuthService.ts and test file
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: No unused code in story scope

mandatory_questions.question: Are there any duplicate implementations?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Check if event signing logic duplicates patterns from crypto.ts or elsewhere
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: Uses finalizeEvent consistently with existing patterns, no duplication

mandatory_questions.question: Do integration tests validate the story's workflow?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Verify end-to-end test: generate token, verify signature, decode header, validate structure
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least one test validates entire token generation → verification cycle
